speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, it doesn't require you to have seen the person. You know the spell's happening, you know the direction of the person. You rolled a high enough perception. I'll allow it. As you hear her chanting beneath her breath and you hear the wave rising, you glance over in the direction and you, having an instinctual affinity with flames and fire, can barely see the darkened shape of her on the opposite side of the flames being warped by the light. Using that moment, you put your hand forward and release the destructive pattern of your Counterspell. With that, the swelling ocean splatters back down to the surface.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Counterspell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. It's a 4th-level spell, so I need you to roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, and it's at disadvantage. (gasps)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What did you get?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a 14 and a 19! She fails!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She does! (cheering and laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look at the veins! Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That was two weeks of tension being released.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Orgasms all under the table right now!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit! You watch as the ocean begins to swell upwards. Avantika raises her arm-- but you said the walls are opaque. Can you see through the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I hear her go (arcane chanting)?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is a fair point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, natural 20 and a 16, plus perception-- The lowest roll was a 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like that you don't know where your perception is right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I never do.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I will say, it would increase the DC for her landing, I'll give you that. But she did roll an 18 on her acrobatics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I say anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say this happens at the very end of your turn. You're running, running, running, all of a sudden you stop right as they (clanking) right there in front of you. We'll pick that up next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That brings us to Avantika's go. All right. Oh, man. Okay. Avantika is going to leap down off the side of the ship. Acrobatics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And slip on the ice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's just difficult terrain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just kidding. Wishful thinking!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Oh, certainly!" He goes and starts taking it. At this point, the Plank King goes, "Take her up top. She'll be the next on the pike. As for the rest of you, you've pulled out a conspiracy, I'll give you that. You've also snuck your way into The Revelry under false pretenses. You've broken our laws within but a day of being presented with them, in multiple ways. That's a serious offense. So hear my judgment upon these folk. You are hereby banished from Darktow. Take the remnants of the Squalleater as your own. Take whatever--" He looks over towards the rest of the crew you hired, who are like (panicked panting).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I worked through the night on that. It's very interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And it's really well done! I'm honestly very taken aback by it. Your penmanship is quite good as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Breakfast.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a sample of her penmanship here if you want to see some more of it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Like, just barely. From the distance where you are now. It'd be just under a thousand if you were right over, but you're not entirely certain how far. The boat isn't set for that currently.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, there you go, back in your shoulder.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, come here you. You are the most important member of this team and don't let Beauregard tell you different. Or Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you ever feel like your relationship with your cat is hindering building stronger relationships with human people?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've told him that a lot of times.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel concerned about you sometimes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that is so silly, isn't it? Silly, yes it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tell us what he found!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He found the boat, Nott. he found the boat. He will lead us to the boat. He found it. He did it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That is great news. Does anybody not want to join? Really? You want to stay up here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How far down is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's the bottom of the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's thousands of feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it wasn't a thousand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thousands of feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Over an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ugh, fuck that. No way!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He carries him off. All right, you gather your supplies, you gather your cannonballs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: On the count of three, when you're ready, you'll lean backwards off the rail and fall into the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: On the count of three, when you're ready.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it stands, the cannonballs are smooth, solid metal. How are you bringing them down with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's a couple of options here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to hold on to the sides.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, we want to be able to carry them so if we have some small bags maybe?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like rope or chain? Oh! Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can just put them in a bag that we can hold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That can be done. You do have a few sacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They're iron, right? I would say that with Nott piggybacking, Caleb would take his dagger and transmute it into iron to meld with the cannonball and grip it that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, make a little handle.
